overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character exploring a coastal Japanese village during a stormy dusk. The character exits a traditional wooden hut and traverses through tall grass overlooking the ocean, passing a sacred shrine tree before entering a dense forest trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional wooden hut interior with storage shelves

events.description: character moves deeper into the dark interior away from the doorway light
character approaches and exits the building through the back doorway

agents.ego_description: moving through the dark interior of the wooden hut, passing wooden shelves before heading toward the back exit

entered.detail: wall-mounted shelves holding pottery and supplies
doorway leading to the bright exterior
wooden floorboards of the traditional hut

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the samurai character inside a dark traditional wooden hut. The character moves away from the front entrance, traverses the dimly lit interior past wooden storage shelves, and approaches the back doorway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with sacred shrine tree and offering platform

events.description: character exits the dark hut into the overcast coastal environment
character slows to observe the sacred tree with hanging talismans

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal wooden walkway, approaching and observing a sacred shrine tree with hanging white talismans

entered.detail: leafless tree with hanging white prayer strips and small shrine at base
wooden structure with hanging items for drying or offerings
tall golden grass lining the coastal path
distant sea visible beyond the cliff edge
plank walkway along the coastal overlook

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the hut onto a wooden deck overlooking the coast. The scene opens to a wide vista with the ocean visible to the left, tall golden grass surrounding the path, and a distinctive sacred tree with hanging white talismans standing prominently ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal dirt path transitioning to forest

events.description: character turns left away from the shrine and continues along the coast
path begins to enter forested area with denser tree cover

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the dirt path away from the shrine area, moving toward the forested coastline

entered.detail: rocky shoreline dropping down to the water
trees beginning to line the path as it approaches the forest

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shrine behind, the character follows a winding dirt path along the coastline. The ocean shifts to the right side as the path curves, and scattered pine trees begin to appear along the route, signaling the transition toward the forest ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with bamboo and pine

events.description: fully enters the dense forest with thick tree canopy overhead
character navigates around rocks and tree roots on the winding path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dense forest trail, surrounded by tall bamboo and pine trees

entered.detail: dense tree cover blocking most of the overcast sky
tall bamboo stalks growing thick along the left side of the path
evergreen trees lining the right side of the forest trail
boulders and stones scattered along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The path enters a dense forest where the canopy blocks the sky, creating a sheltered, enclosed environment. The character walks along a narrow dirt trail winding through bamboo groves and pine trees, navigating around rocks and roots as the forest grows thicker.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic interior of a wooden hut into a vast coastal landscape and finally into a dense, sheltered forest. It begins in the dimly lit interior of a traditional building, moving past wooden storage shelves toward a back doorway. As the character emerges onto a wooden deck, the scene opens into a wide vista of golden grass and the ocean, passing a sacred tree adorned with white talismans. The camera then follows a winding dirt path along the coastline, where the ocean shifts position and scattered pine trees begin to appear. Finally, the environment closes in as the path enters a thick forest of bamboo and pine, with the canopy blocking the sky to create an enclosed trail of rocks and roots.
